name: Manannan mac Lir
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Manannan mac Lir embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: ♆ Neptune
related.teaser: Neptune is the ocean of spirit — dream wave, mystic tide, abyss of compassion.

related.name: Njord
related.teaser: Njord embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: Poseidon
related.teaser: Poseidon embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Aquamarine
related.teaser: Sacral is the river—pleasure, creation, and the moon’s pull in the blood.

related.name: Dionysus
related.teaser: Dionysus embodies ecstasy, wine, liberation — under Jupiter; in Pisces, Leo.

related.name: Tsukuyomi
related.teaser: Tsukuyomi embodies moon, hunt, wilderness — under Moon; in Cancer, Sagittarius.

related.name: Bacchus
related.teaser: Bacchus embodies ecstasy, wine, liberation — under Jupiter; in Pisces, Leo.

related.name: Artemis
related.teaser: Artemis is a tide that remembers — Crescent; under Moon; in Cancer; with II High Priestess.

related.name: Oshun
related.teaser: Sacral is the womb of becoming — water’s embrace, desire’s tide, the dance of creation.

related.name: ☽ Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the tide of psyche — dream mirror, womb of waters, keeper of illusion.
